title: ferulago granatensis
intro: Ferulago granatensis, also known as Spanish lavender, is a perennial plant native to the Iberian Peninsula and North Africa, belonging to the Apiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. Its health benefits include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as a reduction in pain and inflammation. Ferulago granatensis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in aromatherapy and topical applications.
